title: Material Decorations
description: This mod adds decorative variants of already existing blocks.
body:
![Material Decorations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QDQVZBaF/images/339cd4bca019a443f0eb02f542bf33b8255a3896.png)

This mod adds decorative variants of already existing blocks.

Materials included:

 - Amethyst, Copper, Dark Prismarine, Diamond, Emerald, End Stone, Glass, Glowstone,

   Gold, Iron, Lapis, Netherite, Purpur, Quartz, Redstone and Prismarine


Current decoration blocks added by the mod:

 - Buttons

 - Doors

 - Fences

 - Fence Gates

 - Pressure Plates

 - Slabs

 - Stairs

 - Trapdoors

 - Walls
